sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  pageWrapper:
    "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-10 py-8",

  container:
    "max-w-6xl mx-auto",

  headerWrapper:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4 mb-10",

  title:
    "text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900",

  subtitle:
    "text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1",

  card:
    "bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  formSection:
    "p-6 border-b border-slate-200",

  input:
    "w-full bg-slate-100 focus:bg-white border border-transparent focus:border-indigo-500 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:outline-none transition",

  buttonPrimary:
    "inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium shadow-sm transition",

  tableWrapper:
    "divide-y divide-slate-200",

  tableHeader:
    "hidden md:grid grid-cols-2 px-6 py-4 text-xs font-medium uppercase text-slate-500",

  tableRow:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 items-center px-6 py-5 hover:bg-slate-50 transition",

  mobileCard:
    "flex flex-col gap-3 md:hidden",

  desktopRow:
    "hidden md:flex justify-between items-center",

  actionGroup:
    "flex gap-4",

  badge:
    "inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600",

  emptyState:
    "py-20 text-center text-slate-400 text-sm",
};
